nameMeanings.name: Müller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Ernst, Fritz, Franz, Gerhard, Uwe, Dieter, Heinz, Jurgen.
German (Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; mainly Müller): see Mueller . This surname is also very common in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Windmiller
meanings: Americanized form of German Windmüller, an occupational name for a miller (see Muller ).

variants.name: Mueller
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Klaus, Heinz, Helmut, Wolfgang, Manfred, Horst.

German (mainly Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Müller); Dutch: occupational name for a miller, Middle High German müller, German Müller. In Germany, Müller, Mueller is the most frequent of all surnames; in the US it is often changed to Miller or appears as Muller . See also Mulder .

nameMeanings.name: Ital
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Italus, in mythology the name of the father of Romulus and Remus, founders of Rome.

en.lifeSummary: Ital Müller was born as the son of Conrad Müller. He had at least 1 son with Niesser. His occupation is listed as müller in Burgmühle, Stahl, Bitburg, Rhineland, Prussia. He died before 1498, in Lauffen am Neckar, Besigheim, Württemberg, Germany.

ja.Lauffen am Neckar, Württemberg, Deutschl: ドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ベシグヘイムラウフン アム ネッカー
ja.lifeSummary: Ital MüllerはConrad Müllerの息子として生まれた。彼はNiesserとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。プレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレイス ビトブルグスタhルブルグムuhルでの職業はmüllerと記録されている。彼は1498年以前にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ベシグヘイムラウフン アム ネッカーで死去した。

ko.Lauffen am Neckar, Württemberg, Deutschl: 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 베시게이임 로펜 아 니c카르
ko.lifeSummary: Ital Müller(은)는 Conrad Müller의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Niesser(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 크레이스 비트버그 스탈 버그uh일에서 müller이었다. 그는 1498년 이전 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 베시게이임 로펜 아 니c카르에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Ital Müller родился. Его отца звали Conrad Müller. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Niesser.  Он работал по профессии müller в местности бургмuхл, стахл, крис битбург, раинпровинз, Пруссия. Он умер перед 1498 г. в местности лауффен ам неккар, крис бесаиим, вuрттембирг, Германия.
